source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/전장/rev00_20190423/엑센테크닉_ADI_GATE 승인원_190423.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for GERBER_ADI_GATE / GATE BOARD covering PCB data, SMT manufacturing process, reflow profile, assembly PCB, inspection report, and packing.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier approval and manufacturing/inspection/packing reference document for the GATE BOARD assembly.
keyPoints: Approval sheet number is AT-HA-J29-002 and revision is Rev. 0.
Customer is 에이치앤아비즈 ㈜ and supplier is ㈜ Accentechnik.
PCB data identifies 품명 GATE BOARD, MODEL명 GERBER_ADI, and REVISION 0.
SMT process controls include reflow lead-free peak temperature of 235 to 250℃ and manual soldering iron temperature of 395 to 405℃.
Inspection report includes model ADI_GATE_PCB Ass’y, dimension specification 427.0mm x 41.5mm x 1.0T, and power inspection voltage ranges.
Packing section specifies ESD shielding bag, antistatic bubble bag, and ESD box packaging.

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for GERBER_ADI_GATE.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품명(Product Name) GERBER_ADI_GATE ... 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet]

evidence.claim: The approval sheet number is AT-HA-J29-002.
The approval sheet revision is Rev. 0.
The revision history records initial creation on 19.04.23.

evidence.evidenceText: 공급 업체명 ㈜ Accentechnik 대표이사 변 성경

evidence.claim: The table of contents includes PCB DATA, SMT process chart, Reflow Profile, Assy' PCB, Inspection Report, and Packing.
evidence.evidenceText: 목 차 ... 1 -------- P. C. B D A T A 2 -------- SMT 제조공정도 3 -------- Reflow Profile 4 -------- A s s y' P C B 5 -------- INSPECTION REPORT 6 -------- PACKING

evidence.claim: PCB data identifies the item as GATE BOARD, model GERBER_ADI, revision 0.
evidence.evidenceText: 1. P. C. B D A T A 품 명 GATE BOARD MODEL명 GERBER_ADI REVISION 0

evidence.claim: The PCB manufacturing specification lists model ADI_GATE 006, 4 layers, DS-7408 raw material, and thickness 1.00 mm ± 0.10 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL ADI_GATE 006 ... 원 자 재 DS-7408 층수 4 ... 기판두께 1.00 mm ± 0.10 mm

evidence.claim: The SMT process chart is marked as applicable to all models.
The lead-free reflow peak temperature criterion is 235 to 250℃.
Manual soldering iron lead-free temperature control is 395 to 405℃.
Inspection report model is ADI_GATE_PCB Ass’y.
Inspection dimension specification is 427.0mm x 41.5mm x 1.0T with tolerance ± 2.0mm and thickness ± 0.1mm.
Packing uses ESD shielding bag and antistatic bubble bag.
evidence.evidenceText: 2. 포장 2.1 재질 및 규격 가. 정전기 차폐용 쉴딩백 (ESD SHIELDING Bag / 92x470mm) 나. 정전기 방지용 버블백 (Antistatic Bubble Bag / 70x470mm)

evidence.claim: Delivery packaging uses an ESD box with 600X460mm specification and 45EA quantity.
evidence.evidenceText: 3. 납품 3.1 재질 - 가. 정전기 방지용 박스 (ESD BOX) 3.2 박스 규격 - 가. 규격 : 600X460mm (45EA)

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
The main approval sheet and revision history show 19.04.23, but embedded PCB specification text shows 2019년 07월 17일 and inspection report text shows Rev.6(2018.04.18).
No external standards are explicitly identified; visible identifiers appear to be internal forms or procedure numbers.
Some OCR text is low quality or fragmented, especially addresses, approval tables, and process chart table layout.
